entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Advanced lines of recent origin investigated for yield determinants

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The primary output measure used to evaluate genotypic differences

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Non-irrigated soil water environment causing stress

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: Provision of water to the crop to enhance growth and yield

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL MODEL
entities.description: A model used to determine physiological attributes and explain variation in seed yield

entities.name: TOTAL SHOOT BIOMASS
entities.description: The total mass of the shoot system measured in field trials

entities.name: VEGETATIVE DURATION
entities.description: The duration of the vegetative growth phase, denoted as Dv

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE DURATION
entities.description: The duration of the reproductive growth phase, denoted as Dr

entities.name: CROP GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The rate at which the crop grows, denoted as C

entities.name: RATE OF PARTITIONING TO SEED
entities.description: The rate at which biomass is partitioned to the seeds, denoted as p

entities.name: PENINSULAR INDIA
entities.description: The geographical region where field trials were conducted

entities.name: PATH ANALYSIS
entities.description: Statistical method used to determine the contribution of model parameters to seed yield variations

entities.name: REGRESSION TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Statistical methods used to obtain relationships between yield determinants and seed yield

entities.name: BREEDING STRATEGIES
entities.description: Approaches for selecting genotypes based on soil water environments
